data.title: [create-dso-app]: dso-setup.sh invoked via PATH-resolved bash, undocumented dependency on bash>=4 in PATH
data.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: Production code uses bare 'bash' (PATH-resolved) to invoke dso-setup.sh. This silently inherits whatever bash is first in PATH — on macOS, /bin/bash is v3.x. dso-setup.sh has its own set -eu at top so it may fail on bash 3.x. Consider using /usr/bin/env bash or document the bash>=4 requirement.
File: plugins/dso/scripts/create-dso-app.sh
Category: correctness
